scenarios.description: children() filters out mixed non-Element node types (TextNode, DataNode, Comment) and retains Element nodes in correct order
scenarios.precondition: Element el with mixed childNodes: TextNode, DataNode, Comment, Element, CDataNode, Element
scenarios.expectedResult: Elements list size is 2, with only the two Element children in insertion order
pseudocode: TEST TC08 children mixed non-Element nodes

scenarios.description: children() rebuilds cache when only non-Element children added after initial cache build
scenarios.precondition: Element el with one Element child, children() called to build cache
scenarios.expectedResult: After appending a TextNode post-cache, children() returns same single Element child and cache is rebuilt
pseudocode: TEST TC09 children cache invalidated by non-Element addition
Elements first = el.children();  // cache built with one element
